title: Sign in and reach tenant management
description: This verifies a superadmin can authenticate and land on tenant management after signing in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the tenant management page is displayed
Verify tenant summary content is visible

title: Sign in and enter tenant management
description: A superadmin can sign in with valid credentials and reach the tenant management area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the tenant management page is displayed

title: Create a new tenant with apps and admin credentials
description: This verifies a superadmin can create a tenant by entering the organization details, choosing apps, providing initial admin credentials, and seeing confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new tenant
Fill in the organization name field with a unique tenant name
Select one or more available apps for the tenant
Fill in the initial admin name field with a valid name
Fill in the initial admin email field with a valid email address
Fill in the initial admin password field with a valid password
Submit the tenant creation form
Verify a tenant creation confirmation is visible
Verify onboarding email status is visible

title: Create a tenant with admin access and apps
description: A superadmin can create a tenant by providing organization details, selecting apps, and entering initial admin credentials, and the new tenant is created with onboarding confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant creation flow
Fill in the organization name field with Acme Holdings
Select at least one available app
Fill in the admin first name field with Ava
Fill in the admin last name field with Patel
Fill in the admin email field with ava.patel@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with TempPass123!
Submit the tenant creation form
Verify the new tenant is shown in the tenant directory
Verify an onboarding confirmation is visible

title: Suspend an active tenant
description: A superadmin can suspend an active tenant from the directory and see the tenant marked as suspended.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the tenants management link
Open an active tenant action menu
Suspend the tenant
Confirm the suspension
Verify the tenant is marked as suspended

title: Activate a suspended tenant
description: A superadmin can activate a suspended tenant from the directory and see the tenant marked as active.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the tenants management link
Open a suspended tenant action menu
Activate the tenant
Confirm the activation
Verify the tenant is marked as active

title: Start and end tenant impersonation
description: This verifies a support user can start impersonation from the tenant list, see the impersonation state, and return to the original session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start impersonating a tenant from the tenant list
Verify the impersonation banner is visible
Perform a tenant-admin action from the impersonated session
Return to the original superadmin session
Verify the impersonation banner is no longer visible
Verify the superadmin session is restored

title: Configure tenant SMTP settings and send a test email
description: A superadmin can update SMTP settings for a tenant, verify the connection, send a test email, and save the configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant settings for a tenant
Switch to the SMTP settings section
Fill in the SMTP host field with smtp.example.com
Fill in the SMTP port field with a valid port
Select a valid encryption option
Fill in the username field with smtp-user
Fill in the password field with SmtpPass123!
Fill in the from name field with Acme Mail
Fill in the from email field with mailer@example.com
Test the SMTP connection
Send a test email to a valid recipient address
Save the SMTP settings
Verify a successful SMTP connection confirmation is visible
Verify a test email sent confirmation is visible

title: Update tenant SMTP settings and save them
description: This verifies a superadmin can edit SMTP configuration fields and save the tenant settings successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a tenant's settings from the tenant list
Open the SMTP configuration section
Fill in the SMTP host field with a valid host value
Fill in the SMTP port field with a valid port value
Select a valid encryption option
Fill in the SMTP username field with a valid username
Fill in the SMTP password field with a valid password
Save the SMTP settings
Verify the SMTP settings are saved successfully
Verify the updated SMTP configuration is visible

title: Return to the superadmin session
description: A superadmin can exit an impersonated tenant session and regain the original superadmin view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the tenants management link
Choose an active tenant
Start impersonation
Return to superadmin
Verify the impersonation banner is no longer displayed
Verify the original superadmin session is restored

title: Suspend and reactivate a tenant
description: This verifies a superadmin can suspend an active tenant and later reactivate it from the tenant directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant action menu for an active tenant
Suspend the tenant
Open the same tenant action menu again
Reactivate the tenant
Verify the tenant returns to an active state
Verify the tenant status indicator is visible

title: Search the tenant directory and open tenant settings
description: A superadmin can search for a tenant in the directory and open that tenant's settings from the results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Enter a tenant search term
Wait for the filtered tenant results to appear
Open the tenant settings from a matching tenant row
Verify the tenant settings view is displayed

title: View tenant summary and directory
description: A superadmin can access the tenants page and review the summary widgets and tenant directory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the tenants management link
Verify tenant summary widgets are displayed
Verify the tenant directory table is displayed

title: Search and filter the tenant directory
description: This verifies a superadmin can search and filter tenants and see the directory update to matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Enter a tenant search term
Choose a tenant status filter
Verify the tenant list updates to matching results
Verify filtered tenant entries are visible

title: Test tenant SMTP connection and send a test email
description: This verifies a superadmin can run SMTP connectivity checks and send a test email from tenant settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a tenant's settings from the tenant list
Open the SMTP configuration section
Trigger an SMTP connection test
Trigger a test email send
Verify SMTP test results are visible
Verify test email confirmation is visible

title: Open tenant settings from the directory
description: This verifies a superadmin can open a tenant's settings from the tenant directory and reach the tenant configuration view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a tenant's settings from the tenant list
Verify the tenant settings view is displayed
Verify tenant configuration sections are visible

title: Start tenant impersonation and return to the superadmin session
description: A support user can start impersonation from a tenant row, see the impersonation banner, perform tenant actions, and return to the original superadmin session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant action menu for a tenant
Start tenant impersonation
Verify the impersonation banner is displayed
Return to the original superadmin session
Verify the superadmin tenant management view is displayed

title: View tenant analytics dashboard
description: A superadmin can open the analytics page and see aggregated tenant growth and platform usage analytics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login form with {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the analytics link
Verify tenant growth analytics are displayed
Verify platform usage analytics are displayed

title: See validation when required tenant fields are missing
description: A superadmin sees validation messages when attempting to create a tenant without filling required details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant creation flow
Submit the tenant creation form without entering required details
Verify validation messages for missing tenant details are visible

title: Reject tenant creation with missing required information
description: This verifies tenant creation shows validation when required organization or admin fields are left incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new tenant
Submit the tenant creation form without completing required fields
Verify required field validation is visible
Verify the tenant is not created

title: Reject tenant creation with duplicate admin email
description: This verifies tenant creation blocks submission when the initial admin email already exists and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Start creating a new tenant
Fill in the organization name field with a unique tenant name
Fill in the initial admin email field with an email already used by an existing admin
Complete the remaining required tenant fields
Submit the tenant creation form
Verify a duplicate email validation error is visible
Verify the tenant is not created

title: Prevent tenant creation with a duplicate admin email
description: A superadmin sees a duplicate-email validation message when the tenant admin email is already in use.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant creation flow
Fill in the organization name field with Duplicate Email Org
Select at least one available app
Fill in the admin first name field with Jordan
Fill in the admin last name field with Lee
Fill in the admin email field with ava.patel@example.com
Fill in the admin password field with TempPass123!
Submit the tenant creation form
Verify a duplicate email validation message is visible

title: Block invalid SMTP settings
description: A superadmin sees validation feedback when SMTP settings are incomplete or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the tenant settings for a tenant
Switch to the SMTP settings section
Fill in the SMTP port field with an invalid value
Save the SMTP settings
Verify SMTP validation feedback is visible
